Rule Description: Affected versions of Werkzeug are vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF). Exploitation requires the attacker to guess a URL in the developer's application that will trigger the debugger AND requires the attacker to get the developer to interact with a domain and subdomain they control, and enter the debugger PIN.
Affected versions of Jinja2 are vulnerable to Uncontrolled Resource Consumption.
Affected versions of pydantic are vulnerable to Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop').

Rule Name: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor in requests
Rule Description: Affected versions of requests are vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor.
Affected versions of jinja2 are vulnerable to Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting').

Rule Name: Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in pydantic
Rule Description: Affected versions of pydantic are vulnerable to Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity.
Affected versions of Jinja2 are vulnerable to Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting').

Rule Name: Always-Incorrect Control Flow Implementation in requests
Rule Description: Affected versions of requests are vulnerable to Always-Incorrect Control Flow Implementation.
Affected versions of Werkzeug are vulnerable to Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal').
Affected versions of Quart and Werkzeug are vulnerable to Uncontrolled Resource Consumption.
Affected versions of jinja2 are vulnerable to Protection Mechanism Failure.

Rule Name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine in jinja2
Rule Description: Affected versions of Jinja2 are vulnerable to Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine.
Affected versions of requests are vulnerable to Insufficiently Protected Credentials.

Rule Name: Improper Handling of Windows Device Names in werkzeug
Rule Description: Affected versions of werkzeug are vulnerable to Improper Handling of Windows Device Names.

Rule Name: Improper Handling of Windows Device Names in werkzeug
Rule Description: Affected versions of Werkzeug are vulnerable to Improper Handling of Windows Device Names.

Rule Name: Improper Handling of Windows Device Names in werkzeug
Rule Description: Affected versions of werkzeug are vulnerable to Improper Handling of Windows Device Names.
Affected versions of requests are vulnerable to Insecure Temporary File.
Affected versions of Werkzeug are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation.
